4 | P a g e 
 
KULUMBUNUNA 
Kwiza  chakulinangula chachihya, echi chinalumuna vilongeselo vyakutanga  
chakalikilamu inemanyina  hauhashi wakunangakana vyuma (competence based 
curriculum)  chinanehe kwalumuka mukulinangula vyuma kuhichila mukuvilinga 
kaha nachilingisa valongi kukwata chinyingi chamumyaka ino mukuzamikisa kupwa 
nachinyingi chakuzata milimo yakumavoko.  
Uno mukanda wavilongeselo vyamwakunangwila vakashikola vamuuthumbo 
vanausoneka mujila yauhashi wakunangakana vyuma vyanangwilo najishimbi 
jakumona nge kulinangula chinalitoto  nakayoyelo kavathu. Mauhashi akunangakana 
vyuma vanahake mukalikilamu ya 2023  osena analitasana navyuma vyanangwilo 
vanasoneka mumukanda uno  
Mukanada unounemanyina hakukafwa  milongeshi  vanakunangula seteko yavalongi  
vashikola yamuuthumbo kuputuka kunangula vilongeselo vyakalikulumu inemanyina 
hakunangula valongi vyuma vatela kulinga  (competence based curriculum) halwola 
kunahono mikanda vanetavila kuzachisa mumashikola. Echi chili nakusolola  kufwila 
chamuthango wafulumende watala vyamashilo kumona ngana ngwavo milimo 
yamulongeshi vanayashiwisa. Hakulinga ngocho, milongeshi vatela kuzachisa 
chinyingi valinacho chakutanga nakuwana vyuma vikwavo navivakafwako 
mukunangula valongi mumaukalu vanahase kuwana mukunangula vilongeselo evi .  
Ngunachifwelela ngwami milongeshi navazachisa mukanda ou mujila yakwoloka.  
 
 
Joel Kamoko (Mr.) 
Permanent Secretary- Educational Services 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

5 | P a g e 
 
KUSAKWILILA 
Mukanda uno wavilongeselo  vyakutanga mu Luvale vyakunangula valongi mu form 
1   vaulongesele kuhichila mukuhulyojola vathu vavavulu  nakuhomesa vathu hamwe. 
Vathu vavavulu hamwe kaha nanauka avathu akulisezaseza vavahulishile nakuvahana 
nawa lisesa lyakuhana vishinganyeka vyavo havyuma vayatela kusonekewa 
mumukanda uno. Shikaho ngunahane kusakwilila chami kuli vathu vose, namauka 
akulisezaseza  ahanyine chinyingi chavovo hamwe kaha lukafwa chamali 
chinahashisa kusoneka naukufwatula mukanda uno wavinangwilo. Ava vanapu 
milongeshi,vakhuluwa 
vahajizemba, 
mauka 
akulihandununa 
hamwe 
kaha 
navambwembwa. 
Mukukumisa, ngunasakwilila kulihana chavakakuza vakuchihanda chatala vilongeselo 
vyakutanga mumashikola cha Directorate of Curriculum Developmen hakuzata 
nakumona ngana ngwavo mulimo wakosoneka mukanda wakunangula vakashikola 
unazachiwa mujila yamwenemwene 
 
 
Charles Ndakala, (Dr.) 
Director – Curriculum Development 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

KUJIMBULA 
Mukanda uno wavilongeselo vyakunangula va fwomu 1  vanausoneka mangana ukafweko 
milongeshi mukunangula valongi vinangwilo vya Luvale. Mukalikilamu vanalumuna.  Uno 
mukanfa wavinangwilo  vanausoneka managana uzachiwe mukwashiwisa kunangula valongi  
vatete navaputuka  kulinangula vilongeselo vya 2023 kalikilamu shimbu kanda  kupwenga  
kulongesa nakusonejeka  mikanda  ivene  vatela kuzachisa mukutanga nakutangisa. 
Mukutwalililaho, uno mukada uli nakusolola kufwila nakulihana chafulumende kuhichila 
kumuthango watala vyamashikola mukuputuka  kunangula vyakwalumuka chakutanga 
kalikilamu ya 2023 nawa inamono ngana ngwayo vyuma vanasoneka mumukanda uno 
vinatemo mukunangula valongi vyuma navalinangula nakuzata namavoko avo kweseka 
naseteko yakunangakana chalwola tunahetemo.

10 | P a g e 
 
Numba tuhu uno mukanda vanaukupwisa nakuzamikisa vyuma vyakunangula valongi, 
milongeshi vatela kuzachisa chinyingi nauhashi wakutanga chavo nakumona ngana ngwavo 
vali nakuhakilako vyuma vikwaavo vinahase kuzamikisa kutanga chavalongi chikumanyi 
haze vanamono ngana ngwavo hali liphwata. Kuhakilako nawa,  milongeshi vanahase 
kwalumuna milimo chipwe vyuma navalinga valongi  vili mumukanda uno kweseka nakupwa 
chashikola  nashikola vali nakutangilamo valongi. 
Vilongeselo vyosena vili mumukanda uno vanajinyina mukumona ngana ngwavo valongi vali 
nakulinangula vyuma navalinga namavoko avo anakuzamikisa nawa kujiminyina 
muvishinganyeka kaha nawa nakumona ngana nge khala  chihela  chipwe shikola valiho 
valongi  vanahase kulinangula mujila yamwenemwene. Echi kuvwovuwa khana 
chinemanyinana hakuhana uswa wakutanga  nakunganyala chakaliilamu yakukupuka                       
kuli khala longi cjakuzeneka kutala okwo afuma chipwe omu apwa.  
Hilufwelelo lwakumona nge mukanda ou  navinangwilo vilimo vavimone kulema  kupwa 
vyma navikafwa milongeshi kunangula  valongi chinyingi, uhashi nalilimi lyaLuvale  
navilinga vyamwenemwene mukulinangula chakukupuka. 
MWAKUZACHISHILA MUKANDA 
Mukanda  ou unahane vyuma vize navatangisa mutemu yatete mu fwomu 1. 
Vanaupange mumitwe yavihande kaha mutwe wachihande uli navyuma 
vyakulihandununa vyakufwana nge kuhanjika na kwivwilila, kutanga chakujimina na 
kusoneka. Vyuma vili  omu mumukanda kavyeshi vilongeseloko oloze vyakuzachisa 
kusoneka vilongeselo.Hakuwahisa  vilongeselo watela kufumisa vihanda vya mutwe 
wachihande kuvyuma vyakulisezaseza. Chinjikizo, mutwe wachihande watela kupwa 
kuhanjika na kwivwilila, mazu, kutanga na kusoneka.Omu nauwahisa mutwe 
wachihande watela kusakula vyuma vyakunangula namilimo oyo vatela  kuzata 
nauhashi wakunangakana. Shikaho mutwe wachihande naupwa nauhashi 
wakunangakana vyuma vyavivulu.Ngocho, watela kusakula chuma echi nachimbata 
lwola lwalunene muchihande chove. Kuhakilako nawa, milimo vanakuhane 
mumukandavene ou kawatela kuyikumisa muchihande chimweko. Evi vanahase 
kuvikilikita muvilongeselo vyakulihandununa  handununa. 
MWAKUNANGWILA 
Hakunangula, mutwe wachihande watela kukava ‘’Gradual Release Model (GRM),’’ 
kulumbununa nge mulongeshi mwaputuka kulinga mulimo khana, kaha mwaulinga 
hamwe navalongi, kufumaho valongi valinge ukhawavo. Shikaho Unahase kuzachisa 
jijila jakulisezaseza kunangula valongi

CHIHANDE CHIVENE 1:  KUZACHISA VITUMBO 
MUJILA YAKULUWA                      
Kwaula: Visoneka vyosena vili hamutwe wachihande chivene chino naviya 
nakweulula valongi hachihande chavitumbo, chikumakumanyi upi wakuzachisa 
vitumbo mujila yakuluwa. Chihande chivene chino chili namitwe yavihande itanu 
nayivali. Eyi ikhiko; vihande vyakusefuka mujingalila, jila jakulinangwilamo, mazu, 
kutanga nakwivwishisa, walo wachaulo, vihanda vyamazu namazu vazachisa 
mukwalumuna mujimbu. Chihande chivene echi nachikafwa valongi kupwa 
nachinyingi haupi wakuzachisa vitumbo mujila yakuluwa.  
Uhashi Wakunangakana vyuma 
Chihande chivene echi nacheulula valongi vapwenga venya lifuchi vamwenemwene 
vakulihenda mukuzachisa vitumbo mujila yakuluwa.

yakuluwa.

ha Vihande Vyakusefuka Mujingalila (Kuzachisa vitumbo mujila yakuluwa)

18 | P a g e 
 
Twaminyina valongi vatange mujimbu ou uli mwishi. Omwo navatanga, valongi 
vatela kuwana jijila jiwana jakuwanyinamo mali.    
Mu Zambia, nge mumafuchi akwavo nawa, mali akwechi ulemu waunene chikuma 
mukuyoya chavathu. Mali echi kukafwa vathu mujijila jakuliseza-seza. Nge muthu ali 
nazala, nahase kuzachisa mali kulanda vyakulya. Cheka nawa, nge muthu naviji, 
nahase kuzachisa mali kulanda vitumbo chipwe kufweta chimbanda chipwe ndotolo 
mangana vamuke. Eji hijila jimwe hakachi kajijila jikwavo.  
Chipwe mali akwechi ulemu ou, anakaluhwa chikuma makumbi ano kuwawana. Jijila 
jajivulu eji mwahasa kuwanyinamo mali. Jila imwe inapu kuhichila mukusekasana. 
Chinapu chachilemu kuli muthu kupwa hachisakano nakulandulula vikumba 
mwomwo nachihasa kumukafwako kungalanya mali. Nge mulimo wakusekasana 
wakangana, muthu atela kutanga shikola. Muthu natange shikola mwahasa kwingila 
milimo mufulumende chipwe mujikhambanyi. Muthu nengila milimo jino mwahasa 
kutambula fweto kusongo yakakweji.  
Kuhakilaho, muthu nahase kuzachilila tumilimo twawashi-washi twakufwana nge 
kutunga chimbushu, kufula wina wakumbilila swali, kulima wande chipwe kukosa 
uvwalo. Nge nazate lyehi milimo eyi, navamufweta mali kweseka namulimo nazate. 
Lwola lukwavo, muthu nahase kulandulula vikumba vyenyi vize ali navyo 
vyakufwana nge tunyama chipwe vimbuto. Nge nalandulula lyehi vikumba vyenyi, 
mwahasa kuwanako mali.  
Vathu vavavulu veji kuwana vihita vyamali oloze kavatwamako nachinyingi 
chakuhasa kulama chipwe kusweka mali. Ngocho vathu vavavulu vanakupwanga 
namali kumbi limwe oloze kuhutwa cheji kuvawananga mulwola lwalundende kaha.  
Seteko Yakunangakana:  
Unjiho wakwoloka vanauwane mujila yakutesamo  
Mulimo Wamuchivali 
Kuzachisa lisetela lyamazu namitwe yavihande kuwana unjiho mumikanda  
Mulongeshi: 
Alweze valongi kuwana unjiho wahamutwe wachihande umwe uli mumikanda 
Valongi:  
Vawane unjiho wahamutwe wachihande umwe uli mumikanda vanavahane kuli 
mulongeshi.  
 
Seteko Yakunangakana:

19 | P a g e 
 
Unjiho wanauwane mujila yakwoloka kuzachisa lisetela lyamazu namitwe yavihande. 
KWEULULA MULONGESHI 
Kanda kutanga mukanda wosena  
Vachisa lisetela lyamazu chipwe mitwe yavihande mangana vawane kapetulu chipwe 
mutwe wachihande haze navahasa kuwana unjiho ou vali nakutonda. 
Hakuzachisa lisetela lyamazu chipwe mitwe yavihande, navawana mutwe wachihande 
uze wapandama kuchihande chize wavahane. Lisetela chipwe mitwe yavihande 
navivakafwa kuthachikiza halipepa navahasa kuwana unjiho ou.  
Hanyima yakuwana kapetulu chipwe mutwe wachihande haze hali unjiho ou vali 
nakutonda, chakavanga, vatela kutanga washi-washi vawane nge chamwenemwene 
hakhiko vene navahasa kuwana unjiho vanakutonda.  
Nge vali lyehi nashindakanyo yakuwana nge ikhiye kapetulu chipwe ukhiko mutwe 
wachihande uli naunjiho vanakutonda, vatela jino kutanga chakujimina nakashishi 
nakwivwishisa mangana vawane unjiho valinakutonda.   
Vinoma: Mikanda, Mukanda wa Kalunga  
Esekelo: 
Soneka mazu atwama kumukanda wa Vishimo 20:1-2 chipwe mikanda ikwavo 
Kukhukulula: Echi chihande chineulula valongi mwakuwanyina unjiho mumikanda 
chipwe mumujimbu. 
Kuhihisa:  
Echi chihande chineulula valongi mwakuwanyina unjiho mumikanda kuzachisa 
lisetela lyamazu namitwe yavihande.

22 | P a g e 
 
Majikakanwa hiukalu umwe unakuyanjisa mafuchi amavulu muno mukaye, hohamwe 
nalifuchi lya Zambia. Majikakanwa apwa vilinga vyakulyonga chipwe makuli kuli 
vathu vali najingolo vakufwana nge vangamba jafulumende, vatwamina 
jajikhambanyi ava veji kuzachisanga vihela vyavo mangana mangana vawane nganyo. 
Eji kwizanga mumiyachi yakuliseza-seza yakufwana nge kukafwa thanga, 
mukamuyachi wove chipwe litundukwe uze nakufwete. Majikakanwa eji kuzeyesa 
vikilikita vyamithango yafulumende nakuhonesa kutona nakuzovoloka chalifuchi 
mwomwo cheji kujimbalisanga vikumba vyatela kupwa vyavathu muchivulu 
nakuvihaka mumavoko avathu vavandende kaha. Eji kuneha nawa chihandwa 
mukachi kavathu.   
Mu Zambia, majikanwa anayanjisa vathu chikuma mumithango yakufwana nge 
mashikola navipatela. Chinjikizo chimwe chinapu nge mali alifuchi vatelanga 
kutungisa mashikola chipwe vipatela hinavawazachisa mujila yekha yakuluwa, 
chakunehesanga mazuvo navatunga kuhona kulumbunuka nakupuzuka washi. 
Mazuvo akufwana ngana, kawashimbulako. Lwola lwekha, anahase kushiukila vathu 
nakwenyeka myono yavo. Majika kanwa nawa eji kuzeyesa vakamafuchi ekha vaze 
vajinanga kwiza nakusekasana hakuthachikiza ngwavo navasakiwa kufweta 
majikakanwa hakulinga vahase kusekasana mujila yamwemwene.  
Chipwe kuli maukalu khana awa, fulumende ili nakukilikita nangolo kufwila 
kukumisa majikakanwa. Fulumende ya Zambia yahakako muthango wakutala 
havihande vyamajikakanwa vavuluka ngwavo Anti-Corruption Commission (ACC) 
mangana usondwese nakuzangamisa vilinga vyamajikakanwa. Kuhakilako, mauka 
akwavo navaka Zambia vavene vaneuluka jino nakwimanyina chihande echi. Oloze 
kukumisa majikakanwa chasakiwa vathu vose kuzachila hamwe. Kuwuseza mulimo 
ou mumavoko afulumende kaha kacheshi kuhasa kukafwako.

KWEULULA MULONGESHI 
Chaulo chinapu kusoneka mujimbu mujila yakwoloka. Tukwechi miyachi yavyaulo 
vyakuliseza-seza vyakufwana nge, mikanda, kwaula mujimbu. Chipwe miyachi 
yavyaulo yapwa yayivulu, vyaulo vyose vikwechi jindondelo jojimwe jakukavangiza. 
Jindondelo khana eji vajivuluka ngwavo ‘walo.’  
Chaulo hichaulo chikwechi vihanda vitatu; kujimbula, chihande chivene 
nakuhukulula.  
Kujimbula 
Chihanda chatete muchaulo chapwa kujimbula. Kujimbula chasakiliwa kwambulula 
mukavatu chihande chize nauya nakusonekaho. Mukusoneka chihanda chakujimbula, 
unahase kulumbununa mazu amwe aze nauya nakuzachisa mumujimbu nausoneka. 
Jila ikwavo, unahase kusoneka mazu vahanjika chipwe vahanjikile kuli muthu wekha 
oloze ali naulemu kuchihande chove echi uli nakuya nakusoneka. Mazu khana awa 
atela kuneha lipwila kuli mukakutanga mangana afwile kutanga vihande vikwavo evi 
mwaya nakuwana mumujimbu wove.  
Chihande chivene 
Aha hakhiko watela kusolola chinyingi chove hachihande echi uli nakusonekaho. 
Watela kupwa namitwe yavihande eyi naihisa chihande chove chize uli 
nakulumbununa. Mutwe himutwe wachihande watela kuusoneka muchihanda 
chaukhawacho. Mutwe wachihande ukhiko watela kutwaminyina unjiho uze 
nausoneka muchihanda hichihanda. Watela kulumbununa unjiho uze nauhasa kuhisa 
mutwe wachihande uze uli muchihanda unakusoneka. Watela kusoneka unjiho uze 
unapandama kuchihula kechi kusoneka chisonekelako. 
Kukhukulula  
Chihanda chamakumishilo chatela kukhukulula chihande. Vuluka mitwe yavihande 
ize yailemu wafumu nakusoneka helu mukavatu. Muchihanda omu, kawatelako 
kuyilumbununa. Unahase nawa kusoneka vishinganyeka vyove hachihande chize. 
Unahase cheka nawa kukhululula nahanjikiso chipwe ndagwishi ize inapandama 
kuchihande.   
Vinoma: Muvwimbimbi wamutondo halipapilo

KUPWA CHAPHWEVO NUMBA LUNGA 
Tengeso ya Kalunga yapwa mweka Kalunga hakutenga muthu amutengele phwevo   
nalunga. Muchiyoyelo vanahase vosena kupwa hamwe mwomwo hivathu oloze 
mwaya chisemwa valihandununa. Kuli vize ali navyo muthu walunga, waphwevo

38 | P a g e 
 
vyauchi nevi ali navyo phwevo, lunga vyauchi tunejiva Kalunga omu atengele 
phwevo, ovyo atwama navyo nomu apwa. 
Mukatwamino, muthu walunga nawaphwevo vatela kupwa vathu vakuzata milimo 
yoyimwe chakuzeneka chihandwa. Nge muthu waphwevo mwatwa, mwakomba 
nawalunga alingemo nayikhiye kwauchi kwamba ngwavo eyi milimo yakuzata muthu 
waphwevo, eyi yakuzata muthu walunga nduma. Lelo lino kuvanga kuzachila hamwe 
chakuzeneka kahandwa. Tengeso ya Kalunga kaha ikhiko yeji kuhandununanga nge 
ou atela kuvwala khanji, ou atela kuvwala mulukwe.  
Phwevo vamuhana kwimita, kusema nakwamwisa jino lunga vamuhana kusemesa. 
Kaweshi kawana phwevo mwemichisa mukwavo phwevo nyi linga ngana nduma. 
Kaha nawa kawechi kawana lunga mwemita lijimo nakusema mwana hichiyovo. 
Shikaho, echi chikhiko chihandwa chatwamaho. Liuka vavuluka ngwavo ``The 
convention on Elimination of all forms of discrimination Against Women`` (CEDAW)  
Muwihi vali tungile kuli va United Nations `` Zango yakaye mumwaka wa 1979. 
Yatalilenga halisesa lya muthu waphwevo omu vapwilenga nakuvalyachililanga 
mumilimo.  
Eyi Zango khana yatalile hakuhona kupwa nachihandwa mukachi kaphwevo 
naluyanjisa lwa muthu waphwevo vachiyulile kanawa. Lifuchi lya Zambia lyetavilile 
eli lizavu lya (CEDAW) mumwaka wa 1980. Lyaputukile kuzata halikumbi lya 21 
Shikamunene, 1985. Zambia yetavilile nge chilivene, maphwevo vapwilenga 
nakuvayanjisa.  
Hanyima kwapwile kuliwana namafuchi akwavo ku Beijing mu 1995 oku kwapwile 
kushimutwila chakukumisa luyanjisa lwamaphwevo, nakulingisa maphwevo 
vapwenga najingolo muvihela vyachiyoyelo, lisesa lyamuthu waphwevo kupwa 
najingolo mukutunga jishimbi, kukanyisa kuhutwa muli vathu nakukanyisa luyanjisa 
lwa kanyike waphwevo. Zango yakaye yahakileko jingolo mukukanyisa kanyike 
waphwevo kuhona kutanga. Lifuchi lya Zambia lyatungile muthango wakutala 
chakupwa chaphwevo nalunga mu 2005. Eyi Zango ili nakukolezeza jindandanda 
muvihanda chakupwa chalunga numba phwevo nakukolezeza vanyike vamaphwevo 
kutanga mashikola chakuzeneka chihandwa.

ULEMU WALIJINA 
Lijina lyapwa lyalilemu kuli muthu wosena, mwomwo kakhiko kathachikijilo kenyi. 
Nge mwana nasemuka, veji kumuluka Lijina. Lijina nawa kavaliluka chamulukilako 
oloze kweji kupwa vyuma vimwe veji kutalangaho numba khemba vamuluke.  
Khemba vanahase kumuluka lijina kweseka navyuma vyasolokele hakusemuka 
chenyi, shimbu kanda asemuke chipwe kuhindula vakhakuluka vamuthanga. Kuli 
majina akufwana nge Kamiji, Mutondo, Chipango, Masoji, Kameya, Kahilu, Kahalu, 
Kashala, Chijika, Khayi awa atwama nalumbunwiso yawo yakuswama. Kavavula 
kuwaluka tuhuko, oloze kakavulu eji kwimanyina vyuma vimwe. Kaha kuli majina 
akufwana nge Kaumba, Pezo, Mukumbi, Chinyemba, Kayombo, Sombo awa 
kakavulu apwa akuhindula kaha nawa atwama najikhumbu. 
Hakuluka mwana lijina nawa kwatwama jindondelo jakukavangiza. Muchisemwa cha 
Luvale, kakavulu mwana veji kumuluka kuli visemi jakhemba. Khemba vamuluka 
lijina muze pulundundu, hakumuluka vatela kumuhana jimbongo chipwe kasumbi 
kusongo hikumuphambila meya chipwe phemba. Eli lijina khana likhiko 
lyahamuchinji. 
Nge khemba mwalilalila chikuma hanyima yakumuluka lijina, kaha ou khemba 
nakane lize lijina vanamuluku. Shikaho, vatela kumuhana lijina lyekha. Kutala nge 
kalilile-lilileko kufuma hakumuhana lijina kaha lijina nalitava.

67 | P a g e 
 
Eli lijina khana veji kulizachisa haze mwana achili wamundende. Oloze nge ou 
mwana nakolo lyehi (walunga nge nayi lyehi kuthunda/waphwevo nawa nge namono 
lyehi ukulwane) veji kwalumuna nakuzachisa jino majina avo aukulwane. Vekha veji 
kutwalililaho namajina avo aunyike. Kufumaha jino, uze kanyike navamusanyika lize 
lijina lyenyi lyalihya.  
Visemi navathanga vanahase tuhu kuzachisa lijina lyahamuchinji nge yavene 
wauchiho, oloze vakhaka yenyi vanahase tuhu kuzachisa lijina khana numba hali, 
kakavulu nge vanakusapula. Utala eli lijina khana lyahamuchinji navalizachisa kuli 
khala muthu, cheji kusolola nge vanamuhulamisa chipwe kasautu. Ngananyi nge 
vakwavo vanyike vakhiko navalizachisa, chinahase kuneha chijindo nandombo 
mukachi kavo.  
Hali awa majina avali, muthu nahase tuhu kupwa nalijina likwavo lyamuchitatu, eli 
kakavulu valivuluka ngwavo lijina lyakusekeleka. Eli lijina khana lyeji kusolola 
kupwa chauze muthu; vilinga vyenyi vyamwaza tahi nyivyavipi. Lijina khana nahase 
kulilukalyo yavene chipwe navamulukalyo kuli vakwavo muchitungilo. 
Kupwa namajina amavulu chapwa chamwaza muvyuma vyavivulu. Chakavanga cheji 
kusolola kukola chamuthu nakwalumuka. Kwalumuka chalijina cheji kusolola nge 
muthu jino keshi kanyike likhako oloze nakolo kaha atela kulinga vyuma 
vyakulumbunuka kechi vyaufwefweleketeko. Echi chapwa chisemwa chetu, kechi nge 
va Luvale kahako oloze miyachi yekha nawa. 
Chamuchivali, eli lijina lyakusekeleka, lyeji kusolola kupwa chamuthu nomu vathu 
vamuthachikiza muthu khana mungalila. Vyuma veji kutangilangaho vinapu evi; 
kupwa wakuhola, kanwa chikuma, lifwa, mukakuhana, kulikehesa, kulivwimba, 
mukakuyayavala, kuyanda chipwe uhando.  
Majina achisemwa nawa atwama nalumbunwiso yawo yayilemu mukuyoya chavisemi 
namwenya lijina, mwomwo cheji kuvanukisa vyuma vahichilemo kunyima, 
chikumanyi kulama chisemwa kuchina nachijimbala. Lelo lino vathu vavavulu vali 
jino nakuluka vana vavo majina achisemwa nakuwazachisa likha mangana kupwenga 
kulama chisemwa.

MWAYA CHISEMWA 
Zango 
Mwaya chisemwa cha Luvale, malunga kaveshi kuwahilila kushikamina kumahatako 
kuvanga hazango. Zango yapwa nge chisambwe oloze ikhiko yeji kupwanga mukachi 
kalimbo kaha nawa yapwa yayinene. Zango yazata milimo yayivulu, milimo imwe 
ino; malunga valila shima muzango, vihande vavihanjikila muzango nakushikamina 
muzango. Mwaya chisemwa cha Luvale, lunga mwalila shima kuzuvo yenyi 
navamuvuluka kupwa ‘munguli’. Shikaho va Luvale kweseka nachisemwa lunga 
wosena eji kulilanga muzango. Chipwe kanyike nge nahete vikumba, mweza 
muzango nakwaula jila yenyi mwayililile nomu nahetela. Kaha kufumaho, mwahana 
vikumba nahete kuli chilolo wahembo.  
Chilolo mwamunyaka mumavoko nakumukisula, evi vikumba jino navakavitumbika 
kuzuvo yachilolo. Nge hembo naheza mulonga numba chilika, chilolo nahase 
kumbata vize vikumba nakuhanako chipwe kulingisa chize chilika. Ngeji nawa washa 
hembo, mwahetela muzango nakutwa mujimbu omu nendela numba vakwavo haze 
hembo vahase kumutambula nakumuzumbula. Shikaho zango yapwa yayilemu. 
Chuma hichuma veji kuchilingilanga hazango keshi kuzuvoko. 
Seteko Yakunangakana:  Mujimbu vanatange vanauhihisa mujila yakutesamo 
kuzachisa mazu akufuma kumujimbu wakuhanjika.

Majikakanwa apwa amapi kaha nawa eji kulingisanga vathu mumafuchi amavulu 
muno mukaye vyuma kuhona kulingiwa kanawa. Majikakanwa eji kusolokanga 
chipwe kulingiwa chikumanyi kuli vathu vaze vali muvihela vyamilingu vakufwana 
nge vathemesa muzuvo yajishimbi. Vekha nawa shina vathu vaze vali nakuzata 
mufulumende chipwe vaze vakakusekasana. Vathu khana ava, veji kuzachisanga 
vihela vyavo vavahana chipwe ngolo javo jahamilimo mangana jino vanganyale 
mujila ize yakuhenga. 
Majikakanwa apwa mujijila jajivulu. Jijila jimwe jamajikakanwa japwa; kulyonga 
mangana muthu ambate jimbongo chipwe vyuma vize vyajimbongo, kwiva jimbongo 
chipwe vyuma vize vamuhana kulama kumilimo. Jijila jikwavo shina kwingisa 
milimo vathanga jove namasepa chakuhona kusakula muthu uze natela hamulimo 
khana. Jila yamakumishilo yinapu kutambula chipwe kuhana muthu jimbongo chipwe 
chimuna mangana akulingile ovyo unakusaka. Vathu vanalingisa mumajikakanwa 
kavazakama nge kwatwama jishimbi jize jechi kumonanga nge vyuma vatela

83 | P a g e 
 
kuvipangila kanawa. Echi cheji kulingisanga vyuma vahone kuvipangila kanawa. 
Kulinga ngocho, vathu muchivulu veji kuhonanga jino kuya kulutwe muvyuma 
vyavivulu. 
Majikakanwa atwama mumiyachi itatu. Muyachi watete wapwa majikakanwa 
amandende. Muyachi ou wapwa wakufweta jimbongo jajindende kaha nawa ou 
ukhiko unatande chikuma mulifuchi lyetu lya Zambia. Muyachi wauchivali vauvuluka 
ngwavo majikakanwa amanene. Ou wapwa uze wakufweta jimbongo jajivulu 
chikuma kaha nawa veji kuulinganga kuli vathu vaze vali havihela vize vyavinene 
chikuma. Vathu veji kufwetanga vihita vyajimbongo mangana vavetavile kutunga 
mikwakwa yamanenekela chipwe vipatela namashikola aze amanene. Muyachi 
wamakumishilo wapwa majikakanwa amilingu. Muyachi ou, weji kulingiwanga kuli 
vathu vaze navemana havihela vize vyamilingu. Vathu ava veji kuhananga jimbongo, 
wala chipwe unga kuli vathu vaze navakasakula vathwamina mangana vavalumune 
michima yavo sakula kupwa vathwamina. 
 
Mujingalila jajivulu, majikakanwa akhiko eji kuhonesanga jingalila kutona. 
Majikakanwa eji kuhonesanga jingalila kupwa namashikola, vipatela, namikwakwa 
yize yamwaza. Vyuma khana evi vyeji kuhonanga kupwako mwomwo jimbongo 
jamilimo eyi veji kujitwalanga nakujizachisa mumilimo ize muthu umwe chipwe 
vakulava kaha navanganyala. 
Majikakanwa eji kulingisanga vapichi vakufuma kumafuchi ekha kuhona kwiza 
mulifuchi nakusokolola jikambanyi. Echi cheji kulingisanga seteko yakuyanda kuya 
helu chikuma. Echi chili ngocho mwomwo kusokolola jikhambanyi cheji kunehanga 
jimbongo mulifuchi. Oloze, nge milimo yauchi, vathu veji kulingisanga muvyuma 
vize vyauhwanga nawiji. 
Mafuchi osena muno mukaye atwama namithango ize vahana lusesa lwakufwefwenya 
vathu vaze navalingisa mumajikakanwa. Muthango khana ou vauvuluka ngwavo 
Anti-corruption commission. Muthango ou weji kutandakanyisanga kupihya 
chatwama hakulingisa mumajikakanwa.  
Nge majikakanwa nawatepuluka, upite chipwe jimbongo jalifuchi vanahase kujitwala 
kuvyuma vize navikafwa vathu muchivulu mangana kuyoya chavo chiyenga kulutwe. 
Kutepuluka chamajikakanwa chinahase kupwako kaha nge vathu muchivulu 
navazachila hamwe.  
Numba tuhu kuli mithango yatala hakweulula vathu hakupihya chamajikakanwa, 
majikakanwa achili lika nakulingiwa. Chapwa chachilemu vathu vosena mungalila 
kuzachila hamwe nakusolola upi wamajikakanwa. Vathu navalingisa mumajikakanwa 
nawa vatela kuvazangamisa. Kulinga ngocho, vathu navalihenda kulingisa muvyuma 
vyamajikakanwa.

LIKUNA 
Myaka yakunyima vathu vamwene nge tunyama vapwa vavavulu chikuma. Kavatachikijile 
nge vanahase kukumako. Shikaho vapwilenga nakulama makuna avo. Mwapwilenga nakuhita 
myaka ivali numba itatu mangana jino vayenga nakujihamo tunyama. Kaha kavapwilenga 
numba nakwochamoko. Tunyama vapwilenga nakusema nakusemunwina kaha kavapwilenga 
nawomako. 
Awa apwile mangana amwaza akulama makuna natunyama. Oloze ivwenu omu vapwile 
nakulinga. Uze mwenya likuna nge nazange kaha mwasanyika vakwavo. Vamwe 
navakaswama kulutwe, vanasale navocha chipapa. Makuna vapwilenga nakuwocha hanonga. 
Shikaho  munejiva hanonga mwila wosena unomu chikuma. Omu wapwilenga nakwocha 
makuna, vathu vapwilenga nakujiha tunyama vavavulu. Tunyama vakwavo vapwilenga nawa 
nakufwa nakakahya. 
Kaha keshi nge tunyama kahako, manoka, tujila navathu vavene vapwilenga nakufwa. Awa 
apwilenga mangana amapi. Kalunga atuhana tunyama mangana tulikafwe navo. Twatela 
kachi tujihe ovo natuzanga kaha. Oloze nge natwocha makuna kaha natukumisa tunyama 
vosena. Myaka ino jino makuna afulumende. Fulumende inasakula vipapa vimwe kupwa 
makuna. Makuna kana muli tunyama natujila vavavulu chikuma. Vathu vosena vavakanyisa 
kuyamo. Makuna khana kaveshi numba kuwochako. Vatungamo misumba yavinyanga 
vakakulamanga awa makuna najizuvo javangeji. 
Vakafulumende vali nakulama awa makuna mangana tupwenga natunyama. Vathu vali 
nakufuma kumafuchi ekha muno mukaya nakwiza nakutala tunyama. Shikaho etu tunatokwa 
hakupwa natunyama kupwa luheto lwakaye. 
Oloze chipango kwenyi kamwene nge jishimbi khana japwa jangoloko. Chipango afumine ku 
Chifuwe nakuya ku Kabompo nakutonda milimo. Shimbu apwile nakuvandama milimo 
kuvakulwane ayile nakulanda vayishi ku manyinga. Hakuya ku Manyinga awanyine likuna 
lyalinene kuwana tunyama nyi mavu. Omu ejile ku Kabompo afulile jingoji mangana jino 
ayenga nakuta miheto muze mulikuna. 
Hakuputuka kuta miheto katachichikijile nge muze mulikuna mwatwama vathuko. Kuwaha 
tunyama vali mutulo chikuma. Tunyama vakufwana nge vasefu, vaphakasa natunyama 
vakwavo vavanene vapwile nakulinyenga mumiheto. Shikaho likumbi limwe awanyine 
vaphuka mumutondo.Awikile kakahya kenyi nakuvatota. Omu akumishile kwejile peho 
yayinene kaha kaze kakahya kakwachile kumwila nakwocha lize likuna.
